{{nihongo|'''Inari Shrine'''|稲荷神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Ōmi Province]].

== instance of (P31) ==

* {{ill|Shikinai Ronsha|lt=Shikinai Ronsha|ja|論社|qid=Q135022904|1=Shikinai Ronsha}}
* {{ill|Q134917286|ltq=Q134917286|qid=Q134917286|1=Shikinaisha}}
* {{ill|Q845945|ltq=Q845945|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}}
* {{ill|Shikinai Shosha|lt=Shikinai Shōsha|en|Shikinai Shosha|ja|式内小社|simple|Shikinai Shosha|qid=Q134917287|1=Shikinai Shosha}}
* {{ill|Q135160342|ltq=Q135160342|qid=Q135160342|1=Kokuhei-sha}}
* {{ill|Q514480|ltq=Q514480|qid=Q514480|1=Inari shrine}}

== part of (P361) ==

* {{ill|Q11638477|ltq=Q11638477|qid=Q11638477|1=List of Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province}}
** Series ordinal: 142
** P155: {{ill|Nakatano Shrine|lt=Nakatano Shrine|qid=Q135039895|1=Nakatano Shrine (Q135039895)}}
** P156: {{ill|Q11430676|ltq=Q11430676|qid=Q11430676|1=Tagi Shrine}}

== located in the administrative territorial entity (P131) ==

* {{ill|Q843882|ltq=Q843882|qid=Q843882|1=Ōmi Province}}
